when_to_use: MetaMask wallet integration for Web3 app authentication

review.verdict: A cornerstone Web3 vendor whose individual products (Infura, MetaMask) matter more than the brand itself.
review.best_for: Ethereum dev teams relying on MetaMask, Infura, Linea, or Truffle
review.not_for: Decentralization purists or teams wanting non-EVM-first tooling
